sentences.target: On fait juste le mariage civil.

translations.fr: On fait juste le mariage civil.
translations.en: We’re just doing the civil wedding.
translations.de: Wir machen nur die standesamtliche Trauung.
translations.pt: Só vamos fazer o casamento civil.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chỉ làm lễ cưới dân sự.
translations.nl: We doen alleen het burgerlijk huwelijk.
translations.hi: हम सिर्फ कोर्ट मैरिज कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは結婚式はせず、入籍だけします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/collective subject pronoun; 3rd person singular, often used in spoken French for 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'on'.
Adverb limiting the scope of the predicate; means 'only/just'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'mariage'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the noun phrase 'le mariage civil'.
Adjective, masculine singular, modifying 'mariage' to specify 'civil (non-religious)'.

sentences.target: Tu récupères ton extrait d'état civil.

translations.fr: Tu récupères ton extrait d'état civil.
translations.en: You’re picking up your civil registry document.
translations.es: Recoges tu certificado del registro civil.
translations.de: Du holst deine Urkunde vom Standesamt ab.
translations.it: Ritiri il tuo estratto di stato civile.
translations.zh-Hans: 你来领取你的民事登记证明。
translations.yue: 你嚟拎你嘅民事登記文件。
translations.ru: Ты забираешь свою справку из ЗАГСа.
translations.pt: Você vai retirar seu documento do registro civil.
translations.he: אתה אוסף את תמצית הרישום שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn đến nhận trích lục hộ tịch của mình.
translations.ar: أنت تستلم وثيقتك من السجل المدني.
translations.nl: Je haalt je uittreksel uit de burgerlijke stand op.
translations.uk: Ти забираєш свій витяг з РАЦСу.
translations.hi: तुम अपना सिविल रजिस्ट्री दस्तावेज़ ले रहे हो.
translations.pl: Odbierasz swój dokument z urzędu stanu cywilnego.
translations.el: Παραλαμβάνεις το απόσπασμα ληξιαρχικής πράξης σου.
translations.nb: Du henter utdraget fra folkeregisteret ditt.
translations.id: Kamu mengambil dokumen dari catatan sipil.
translations.sv: Du hämtar ditt utdrag från folkbokföringen.
translations.ro: Îți ridici extrasul de stare civilă.
translations.cs: Vyzvedáváš si svůj výpis z matriky.
translations.da: Du henter dit udskrift fra folkeregisteret.
translations.ja: あなたは戸籍抄本を受け取っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; means 'to get back/retrieve'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; agrees with 'extrait'.
Common noun, masculine; here 'extrait (copy/extract)' of a record.
Fusion of the elided preposition 'de' with 'état' ('state'); functions as a prepositional complement in the fixed expression 'extrait d'état civil' (civil status extract).
Adjective modifying 'état' in the fixed phrase 'état civil' meaning 'civil status'.

sentences.target: Un civil attend devant la porte.

translations.fr: Un civil attend devant la porte.
translations.en: A civilian is waiting in front of the door.
translations.es: Un civil espera delante de la puerta.
translations.de: Ein Zivilist wartet vor der Tür.
translations.it: Un civile aspetta davanti alla porta.
translations.pt: Um civil está esperando em frente à porta.
translations.vi: Một người dân thường đang chờ trước cửa.
translations.nl: Een burger wacht voor de deur.
translations.hu: Egy civil vár az ajtó előtt.
translations.hi: एक नागरिक दरवाज़े के सामने इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ένας πολίτης περιμένει μπροστά στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: En sivil person venter foran døren.
translations.id: Seorang warga sipil sedang menunggu di depan pintu.
translations.sv: En civil person väntar framför dörren.
translations.ro: Un civil așteaptă în fața ușii.
translations.da: En civil person venter foran døren.
translations.ja: 民間人がドアの前で待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'civil'.
Common noun meaning 'a civilian'; subject of the verb 'attend'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Ils arrivent en civil pour discuter.

translations.fr: Ils arrivent en civil pour discuter.
translations.en: They arrive in plain clothes to talk.
translations.de: Sie kommen in Zivil, um zu reden.
translations.ru: Они приходят в штатском, чтобы поговорить.
translations.pt: Eles chegam à paisana para conversar.
translations.he: הם מגיעים בבגדים אזרחיים כדי לדבר.
translations.vi: Họ đến trong trang phục thường để nói chuyện.
translations.nl: Ze komen in burgerkleding om te praten.
translations.uk: Вони приходять у цивільному, щоб поговорити.
translations.hi: वे बात करने के लिए सादे कपड़ों में आते हैं.
translations.el: Έρχονται με πολιτικά για να μιλήσουν.
translations.nb: De kommer i sivile klær for å snakke.
translations.id: Mereka datang dengan pakaian biasa untuk berbicara.
translations.sv: De kommer i civila kläder för att prata.
translations.ro: Vin în haine civile ca să discute.
translations.cs: Přicházejí v civilu, aby si popovídali.
translations.da: De kommer i civilt tøj for at tale.
translations.ja: 彼らは私服で話しに来る。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed group).
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Preposition introducing a manner/complement phrase.
Adjective (masculine singular) used predicatively with 'en' in the set phrase 'en civil' meaning 'in civilian clothes'.
Subordinator introducing a purpose infinitive clause ('pour discuter').
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'pour' to express purpose.

Un civil attend devant la porte.
Ils arrivent en civil pour discuter.

You’re picking up your civil registry document.
A civilian is waiting in front of the door.
They arrive in plain clothes to talk.
